textPlain: Dude, this is fantastic. Thank you. This is my biggest annoyance because I don't have reception in the elevator and I always only remember to check the bikes when I'm there.For the SF Bay Area, the relevant endpoints are:https://gbfs.lyft.com/gbfs/2.3/bay/en/station_information.js...andhttps://gbfs.lyft.com/gbfs/2.3/bay/en/station_status.jsonWith this I can build myself a little display that does the same. It does seem to match with the app, but in a tragic twist of fate it appears that the station closest to me has been delisted on the app. Oh fate! What the right hand giveth, the left hand takes!EDIT: Funny that these days no one puts their RSS feed link somewhere visible. Fortunately, most clients do find it on the page quite easily. I wonder how they do. It's not in the HTML source.
